mapper.sql: t1.ID, t1.USER_ID, t1.DEPT_ID, t1.COMMANDOS_NAME, t1.COMMANDOS_TYPE, t1.SETUP_TIME, t1.COMMANDOS_CHARGER, t1.IN_PARTYORG, t1.CHARGER_POST, t1.ADMINORTECH, t1.PARTY_NUM, t1.PM_NUM, t1.UNIONDEPTS_YN, t1.UNION_DEPTS, t1.KEY_PROBLEMS, t1.PC_SECRET_LEVEL, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.VERSION, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.ATTRIBUTE_01, t1.ATTRIBUTE_02, t1.ATTRIBUTE_03, t1.ATTRIBUTE_04, t1.ATTRIBUTE_05, t1.ATTRIBUTE_06, t1.ATTRIBUTE_07, t1.ATTRIBUTE_08, t1.ATTRIBUTE_09, t1.ATTRIBUTE_10, t1.ATTRIBUTE_11, t1.ATTRIBUTE_12, t1.ATTRIBUTE_13, t1.ATTRIBUTE_14, t1.ATTRIBUTE_15, t1.ATTRIBUTE_16, t1.ATTRIBUTE_17, t1.ATTRIBUTE_18, t1.ATTRIBUTE_19, t1.ATTRIBUTE_20, t1.AUTO_CODE, t1.TEL

if.test: bean.bpmType != null and bean.bpmType != '' and bean.bpmType == 'my'

sql.if: and exists (select 1 from BPM_CLIENT_HIST_TASK_V os where os.task_b_id_ = t1.id and os.assignee_ = #{bean.currUserId})

if.test: bean.bpmState != null and bean.bpmState != '' and bean.bpmState != 'all'

mapper.select:
select
from PARTY_COMMANDOS t1 left join BPM_CLIENT_HIST_PROCINST_V v on t1.id = v.formid_

select
from PARTY_COMMANDOS t1 left join sys_bpm_hist_procinst v on t1.id = v.formid_

select
from PARTY_COMMANDOS t1 left join sys_bpm_hist_procinst v on t1.id = v.formid_
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
select count(*) from PARTY_COMMANDOS where commandos_type = '1'
mapper.insert:
insert into PARTY_COMMANDOS
ID,
USER_ID,
DEPT_ID,
COMMANDOS_NAME,
COMMANDOS_TYPE,
SETUP_TIME,
COMMANDOS_CHARGER,
IN_PARTYORG,
CHARGER_POST,
ADMINORTECH,
PARTY_NUM,
PM_NUM,
UNIONDEPTS_YN,
UNION_DEPTS,
KEY_PROBLEMS,
PC_SECRET_LEVEL,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
VERSION,
ORG_IDENTITY,
CREATED_DEPT,
ATTRIBUTE_01,
ATTRIBUTE_02,
ATTRIBUTE_03,
ATTRIBUTE_04,
ATTRIBUTE_05,
ATTRIBUTE_06,
ATTRIBUTE_07,
ATTRIBUTE_08,
ATTRIBUTE_09,
ATTRIBUTE_10,
ATTRIBUTE_11,
ATTRIBUTE_12,
ATTRIBUTE_13,
ATTRIBUTE_14,
ATTRIBUTE_15,
ATTRIBUTE_16,
ATTRIBUTE_17,
ATTRIBUTE_18,
ATTRIBUTE_19,
ATTRIBUTE_20,
AUTO_CODE,
TEL,
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{commandosName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{commandosType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{setupTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{commandosCharger,jdbcType = CLOB},
#{inPartyorg,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{chargerPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{adminortech,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{pmNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{uniondeptsYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{unionDepts,jdbcType = CLOB},
#{keyProblems,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{pcSecretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into PARTY_COMMANDOS( ID , USER_ID , DEPT_ID , COMMANDOS_NAME , COMMANDOS_TYPE , SETUP_TIME , COMMANDOS_CHARGER , IN_PARTYORG , CHARGER_POST , ADMINORTECH , PARTY_NUM , PM_NUM , UNIONDEPTS_YN , UNION_DEPTS , KEY_PROBLEMS , PC_SECRET_LEVEL , CREATED_BY , CREATION_DATE , LAST_UPDATED_BY , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , LAST_UPDATE_IP , VERSION , ORG_IDENTITY , CREATED_DEPT , ATTRIBUTE_01 , ATTRIBUTE_02 , ATTRIBUTE_03 , ATTRIBUTE_04 , ATTRIBUTE_05 , ATTRIBUTE_06 , ATTRIBUTE_07 , ATTRIBUTE_08 , ATTRIBUTE_09 , ATTRIBUTE_10 , ATTRIBUTE_11 , ATTRIBUTE_12 , ATTRIBUTE_13 , ATTRIBUTE_14 , ATTRIBUTE_15 , ATTRIBUTE_16 , ATTRIBUTE_17 , ATTRIBUTE_18 , ATTRIBUTE_19 , ATTRIBUTE_20 , AUTO_CODE , TEL )
select #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.commandosName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.commandosType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.setupTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.commandosCharger,jdbcType = CLOB} , #{item.inPartyorg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.chargerPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.adminortech,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.pmNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.uniondeptsYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.unionDepts,jdbcType = CLOB} , #{item.keyProblems,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.pcSecretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update PARTY_COMMANDOS
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
COMMANDOS_NAME = #{commandosName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
COMMANDOS_TYPE = #{commandosType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SETUP_TIME = #{setupTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
COMMANDOS_CHARGER = #{commandosCharger,jdbcType = CLOB},
IN_PARTYORG = #{inPartyorg,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CHARGER_POST = #{chargerPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ADMINORTECH = #{adminortech,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_NUM = #{partyNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
PM_NUM = #{pmNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
UNIONDEPTS_YN = #{uniondeptsYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
UNION_DEPTS = #{unionDepts,jdbcType = CLOB},
KEY_PROBLEMS = #{keyProblems,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PC_SECRET_LEVEL = #{pcSecretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_11 = #{attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTRIBUTE_12 = #{attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
ATTRIBUTE_13 = #{attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_14 = #{attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_15 = #{attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTRIBUTE_16 = #{attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_17 = #{attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_18 = #{attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_19 = #{attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_20 = #{attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
AUTO_CODE = #{autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TEL = #{tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update PARTY_COMMANDOS set ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , COMMANDOS_NAME = #{commandosName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , COMMANDOS_TYPE = #{commandosType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SETUP_TIME = #{setupTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , COMMANDOS_CHARGER = #{commandosCharger,jdbcType = CLOB} , IN_PARTYORG = #{inPartyorg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CHARGER_POST = #{chargerPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ADMINORTECH = #{adminortech,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NUM = #{partyNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , PM_NUM = #{pmNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , UNIONDEPTS_YN = #{uniondeptsYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , UNION_DEPTS = #{unionDepts,jdbcType = CLOB} , KEY_PROBLEMS = #{keyProblems,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PC_SECRET_LEVEL = #{pcSecretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_11 = #{attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_12 = #{attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , ATTRIBUTE_13 = #{attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_14 = #{attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_15 = #{attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_16 = #{attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_17 = #{attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_18 = #{attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_19 = #{attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_20 = #{attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , AUTO_CODE = #{autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TEL = #{tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update PARTY_COMMANDOS set ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_ID = #{item.userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_ID = #{item.deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , COMMANDOS_NAME = #{item.commandosName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , COMMANDOS_TYPE = #{item.commandosType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SETUP_TIME = #{item.setupTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , COMMANDOS_CHARGER = #{item.commandosCharger,jdbcType = CLOB} , IN_PARTYORG = #{item.inPartyorg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CHARGER_POST = #{item.chargerPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ADMINORTECH = #{item.adminortech,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NUM = #{item.partyNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , PM_NUM = #{item.pmNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , UNIONDEPTS_YN = #{item.uniondeptsYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , UNION_DEPTS = #{item.unionDepts,jdbcType = CLOB} , KEY_PROBLEMS = #{item.keyProblems,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PC_SECRET_LEVEL = #{item.pcSecretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{item.attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{item.attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{item.attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{item.attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{item.attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{item.attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{item.attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{item.attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_11 = #{item.attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_12 = #{item.attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , ATTRIBUTE_13 = #{item.attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_14 = #{item.attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_15 = #{item.attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_16 = #{item.attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_17 = #{item.attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_18 = #{item.attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_19 = #{item.attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_20 = #{item.attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , AUTO_CODE = #{item.autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TEL = #{item.tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}
